name: enzo-ai
description: Enzo AI - a self-hosted, local-first AI chat experience

scripts.build:cli: yarn workspace @enzo-ai/cli build && ncc build cli/dist/index.js -o cli/dist/bundle -q
scripts.build: yarn build:server && yarn build:web && yarn build:cli
scripts.dist:win: yarn build && yarn build:desktop && yarn workspace @enzo-ai/desktop dist:win && yarn fix:sqlite
scripts.dist:mac: yarn build && yarn build:desktop && yarn workspace @enzo-ai/desktop dist:mac && yarn fix:sqlite
scripts.dist:linux: yarn build && yarn build:desktop && yarn workspace @enzo-ai/desktop dist:linux && yarn fix:sqlite
